params.owner_: The owner address of the player.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.metadataUri_: The IPFS or similar URI for the player metadata.
params.name_: The display name for the player.
params.owner_: The wallet that owns the player identity.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.owner_: The wallet that owns the player identity.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.owner_: The wallet that owns the player identity.

getPlayer(address).notice: Returns the player information for a given owner address.

getPlayerOwner(uint256).notice: Returns the owner address for a player ID.

setPlayerStatus(address,uint8).notice: Updates the status of an existing player.

updatePlayerMetadata(address,string).notice: Updates the metadata URI for an existing player.
